title: Changelog
subtitle: Get the latest updates and improvements to our platform.

entries.title: Intl Language
entries.description: Today's update adds international language support so TwizzTools can be used in Indonesian and English.
changes: Multi-language support powered by i18n
Indonesian and English language options
Homepage, navigation, tools, FAQ, settings, and changelog content translated
Changelog date format follows the active locale
Cross-language user experience made more consistent

entries.title: Team Picker
entries.description: Today's update adds Team Picker to help you select and randomize team members more quickly.
changes: New Team Picker feature for determining team members
Team selection flow made faster and more practical
Navigation to Team Picker added for easy access
User experience improvements for collaboration workflow

entries.title: Convert Image
entries.description: The next update adds the Convert Image tool for image conversion and compression directly from your browser.
changes: New Convert Image page for uploading multiple images
Convert PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats
Quality settings for JPEG and WebP compression
Download individual results or ZIP for multiple files
Convert Image shortcut added to homepage and sidebar

entries.title: Changelog, FAQ, and Theme
entries.description: The next update will focus on product information pages, lightweight documentation, and theme experience.
changes: Changelog page for product update history
FAQ for common user questions
Theme toggle for light and dark modes
Settings, Changelog, and FAQ navigation refinement
Copy, metadata, and content structure improvements

entries.title: AI Captions Generator
entries.description: Adding AI Captions feature to help creators generate social media captions faster.
changes: New Captions page to generate captions with AI
Tone, platform, language, and caption variation settings
Footer manager to save reusable CTAs, hashtags, and signatures
Local rate limit to keep usage safe
Google Analytics installed for homepage usage tracking

entries.title: Rebuild TwizzCutter to TwizzTools
entries.description: TwizzCutter.com rebuilt into TwizzTools.my.id with a new foundation for creator tools collection.
changes: Brand migration from TwizzCutter to TwizzTools
New domain TwizzTools.my.id
Image Cutter still available for Instagram grid and carousel
Reels Maker still available for 9:16 vertical content format
Dashboard, sidebar, and navigation layout rebuilt
